sentences.arabic: يَحْتَلُّ مَفْهُومُ الْكَرَمِ مَكَانَةً مَرْكَزِيَّةً فِي الْمَنْظُومَةِ الْقِيَمِيَّةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ وَيُعَدُّ مَصْدَرَ فَخْرٍ وَاعْتِزَازٍ لِلْفَرْدِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Koncept velikodušnosti zauzima centralno mjesto u arapskom sustavu vrijednosti i smatra se izvorom ponosa za pojedinca i zajednicu.
sentences.translationEn: The concept of generosity occupies a central place in the Arab value system and is considered a source of pride for both the individual and the community.
